$comment: Pinned offline gaze assets for the webcam composer (Phase 6, provisioned for phase-6-done; D-3.2). 100% offline (SPEC §1): the MediaPipe model is downloaded once and sha256-verified, then served by the hub from apps/web-client/public/ — never a CDN at runtime. The WASM ships in the @mediapipe/tasks-vision npm package and is copied by `cargo xtask download-gaze-assets`.

models.purpose: MediaPipe Face Landmarker (478 landmarks incl. iris) — webcam gaze estimation in the composer (SPEC §4).
